description_long: This object consists of several tall, black metal filing cabinets arranged in a group, with some standing upright and others toppled over. The cabinets feature multiple drawers, each with a rectangular label holder and a small handle, and are surrounded by scattered papers and folders on a glossy black tiled floor. The metal surfaces are slightly worn, giving a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The drawers are partially open, revealing more papers inside, and the toppled cabinets expose their undersides and backs. The scattered documents add a sense of disarray, suggesting recent activity or neglect. The overall scene evokes the atmosphere of an archive or office storage area in a state of disorder.
description: A group of black metal filing cabinets, some upright and some toppled, surrounded by scattered papers on a glossy tiled floor. The cabinets have multiple drawers with label holders and small handles, giving an industrial, disordered look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three tall filing cabinets upright and three toppled, with many papers scattered in front and around.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinets and the toppled units, with papers spread along the floor.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the upright cabinets and the tops of the toppled ones, with scattered papers visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the sides of the cabinets and the disarray of papers, emphasizing the toppled units.
